name: GTM Pipeline Q2 Review Service Blueprint
readme:
# GTM Pipeline Q2 Review

PM brief: Revenue operations needs a governed GTM agent system that can answer pipeline health, enrichment, prioritization, and outreach-support questions across four bounded ANIP services while preserving actor-aware visibility, explicit service handoffs, approval stops, and auditable behavior.

This package contains the signed ANIP behavior contract, recommended lock file, and tooling metadata for agent integration.
Custom implementation code is not embedded in the behavior contract unless it is explicitly attached as implementation material.

Project: gtm-pipeline-q2-review
Package: gtm-pipeline-q2-review@0.4.1
Services: 4 (gtm-pipeline-service, gtm-enrichment-service, gtm-prioritization-service, gtm-outreach-service)
Capabilities: 23 (gtm.pipeline_summary, gtm.pipeline_forecast_summary, gtm.stage_bottleneck_summary, gtm.sales_team_performance_summary, gtm.product_pipeline_summary, gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan, gtm.stalled_opportunity_review, gtm.account_risk_summary, gtm.prepare_followup_tasks, gtm.account_enrichment_summary, gtm.lookalike_accounts, gtm.at_risk_account_enrichment_summary, ...)

## Generate

From a downloaded package bundle:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --package-bundle <downloaded-package>.anip-package.json --target python --dependency-source local --output ./generated/gtm-pipeline-q2-review --force
```

From a trusted registry package:

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-generate --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id gtm-pipeline-q2-review --package-version 0.4.1 --target python --dependency-source registry --output ./generated/gtm-pipeline-q2-review --force
```

## Verify

```bash
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --definition anip-service-definition.json
go run ./cmd/anip-verify --registry-url <registry-url> --package-id gtm-pipeline-q2-review --package-version 0.4.1
```

probes.rationale: Agents must not invent required temporal business scope from examples or defaults.

intent.summary: Return a bounded pipeline health summary for a quarter and optional scope.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for the pipeline summary.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: response detail level.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

business_language_rules.meaning: Risk concentration at the pipeline-summary level means bounded risk distribution or concentration evidence, not raw export or hidden row-level detail.
business_language_rules.interpretation: Treat bounded risk concentration wording as supported summary intent for this capability.

intent.summary: Return a bounded forecast summary for open pipeline with likely, best-case, and risk-adjusted views.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for the forecast.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: forecast scenario to summarize.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum contributing accounts to return.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Return a bounded stage bottleneck summary for open pipeline by an allowed slice.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for bottleneck analysis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: allowed bottleneck grouping.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum bottleneck rows to return.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Return a bounded sales team performance summary for a quarter and optional scope.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for team performance.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: allowed team-performance grouping.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum team rows to return.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Return a bounded product pipeline summary for a quarter and optional scope.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for product pipeline performance.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional product focus.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum product rows to return.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Prepare a reassignment preview for overloaded pipeline coverage without executing downstream mutations.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for reassignment preview.
Reviewed PM/dev input: reassignment candidate selection basis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum reassignment candidates to include.

result_display.style: Show preview, approval requirement, and bounded impact before details.

app_boundaries.guidance: This capability is approval-governed. Invoke it to produce the service-owned preview/request; do not execute the governed action in app code.

intent.summary: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for stalled-opportunity review.
Reviewed PM/dev input: minimum open duration threshold.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum opportunities to return.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for account-risk ranking.
Reviewed PM/dev input: risk ranking basis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum number of accounts to include.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for follow-up preview selection.
Reviewed PM/dev input: risk ranking basis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum number of follow-up task previews to include.

result_display.style: Show preview, approval requirement, and bounded impact before details.

app_boundaries.guidance: This capability is approval-governed. Invoke it to produce the service-owned preview/request; do not execute the governed action in app code.

intent.summary: Return bounded firmographic and account context for selected accounts.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: selected account cohort provided by user or app glue before enrichment.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum number of accounts to summarize.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Return explainable lookalike accounts for an approved reference account or cohort.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: reference account name for lookalike matching.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum number of lookalike accounts to return.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Enrich accounts selected from a bounded at-risk account review without exposing raw enrichment data.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for at-risk account selection.
Reviewed PM/dev input: at-risk account ranking basis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum accounts to enrich.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.

intent.summary: Score bounded leads or accounts with explainable reasons.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: approved lead cohort reference.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum leads to return.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional actor-safe ownership scope.

result_display.style: Show recommendations or variants with concise rationale.

intent.summary: Prioritize bounded accounts for GTM action with explainable ranking.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: approved account cohort reference.
Reviewed PM/dev input: account prioritization ranking basis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum accounts to return.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional actor-safe ownership scope.

result_display.style: Show recommendations or variants with concise rationale.

intent.summary: Prepare bounded routing recommendations without executing downstream assignment mutations.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: approved lead cohort reference for routing.
Reviewed PM/dev input: destination queue or team.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional actor-safe ownership scope.

result_display.style: Show recommendations or variants with concise rationale.

app_boundaries.guidance: This capability is approval-governed. Invoke it to produce the service-owned preview/request; do not execute the governed action in app code.

business_language_rules.meaning: Account-executive follow-up can describe the destination or purpose of a routing preview. It is not outreach drafting unless the user asks to draft, write, generate, send, email, message, or create content.
business_language_rules.interpretation: Keep this as routing/approval-preview intent, not outreach-content intent.

intent.summary: Compose gtm.prioritize_accounts -> gtm.route_leads when the requested business action needs derived targets before governed preparation.

input_semantics.summary: Account cohort; map phrases like expansion candidates to expansion_candidates_q2 and at risk q2 to at_risk_q2
Reviewed PM/dev input: destination queue or team for the routing recommendation.
Priority ranking basis
Maximum accounts to return
Actor-safe ownership scope

result_display.style: Show recommendations or variants with concise rationale.

app_boundaries.guidance: This capability is approval-governed. Invoke it to produce the service-owned preview/request; do not execute the governed action in app code.

intent.summary: Draft bounded outreach content for approved account or contact context.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: lead or account reference for the draft.
Reviewed PM/dev input: outreach objective.
Reviewed PM/dev input: draft channel.
Reviewed PM/dev input: target persona or audience.

result_display.style: Show generated draft content first, then rationale and evidence.

intent.summary: Suggest bounded follow-up content for an approved outreach or account context.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: lead or account reference for follow-up content.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum variants to return.
Reviewed PM/dev input: target persona or audience.

intent.summary: Generate bounded objection-response variants for a known account or outreach scenario.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: objection category selected by the consuming app or provided by the user.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional account or lead reference.
Reviewed PM/dev input: target persona or audience.

result_display.style: Show recommendations or variants with concise rationale.

intent.summary: Prioritize a bounded account cohort, include bounded enrichment context for the top accounts, and draft one outreach message for the highest-priority account.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: approved account cohort to prioritize before drafting.
Reviewed PM/dev input: prioritization ranking basis.
Reviewed PM/dev input: maximum accounts to consider before drafting.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: outreach objective.
Reviewed PM/dev input: requested outreach channel.
Reviewed PM/dev input: target persona or audience.

result_display.style: Show generated draft content first, then rationale and evidence.

intent.summary: Draft outreach for a specific account selected from a bounded bottleneck or at-risk account review.

input_semantics.summary: Reviewed PM/dev input: business quarter for bottleneck context.
Reviewed PM/dev input: specific account selected from the bottleneck or at-risk review.
Reviewed PM/dev input: optional region, team, owner, or company-wide scope.
Reviewed PM/dev input: outreach objective.
Reviewed PM/dev input: requested outreach channel.
Reviewed PM/dev input: target persona or audience.

result_display.style: Show generated draft content first, then rationale and evidence.

result_display.style: Show the bounded summary and key supporting evidence.
